case_title: EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC VS. AMELIA GREPO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE AMELIA GREEPO FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GREPO, AMELIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-23-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
